mechanic._payout_note: 2-card blackjack. Each ring shows the 13 ranks (A,2,...,10,J,Q,K). Both rings spin → 2 cards. Total scored by blackjack rules: A=11 unless that busts (only A+A → counts one A as 1 = 12). J/Q/K = 10. Payout above N=17: 21 = 6× (jackpot), 20 = 2×, 19 = 1×, 18/17 = push (stake refund), < 17 = forfeit.
mechanic._hub_note: Hub bumped back up — small hub made cards visually overwhelming. 35% gives the centre chip-stack room and tames the card real-estate.
mechanic._icon_passthrough_note: Cards ship with their own colours baked in (real LGPL-licensed art from htdebeer/SVG-cards, generated via tools/generate_blackjack_card_icons.py). Outer ring = spades, inner ring = hearts. The PNGs have been pre-rotated 180° via tools/rotate_blackjack_icons.py so the shader's natural wedge mapping renders them face-OUTWARD (rank/suit at the outer rim).
mechanic._suit_rank_note: A high (11/1) per blackjack; J/Q/K all = 10. Tie-break unused by card_total — present for any pattern-chain fallback.
mechanic._pattern_note: Generic card-total lookup. rank_values overrides A/K/Q/J (numeric ranks 2–10 fall through to int-parse). bust_rescue lets one ace drop 11→1 per pass until total ≤ bust_threshold. awards lookup is by final total; missing → 0 (forfeit).
